findings.location: s2 — [往路処理（復路）] section label
findings.description: The knowledge file labels the outbound/return section as "[往路処理（復路）]" — adding "（復路）" which does not exist in the source. The source uses "**[往路処理]**" for that section (same label as the inbound section, which appears to be a typo in the source, but the knowledge file should not add an interpretation).
findings.source_evidence: Source: `**[往路処理]**` (under `.. _outbound:`) — no "（復路）" qualifier present anywhere in the source file.
